Off Calendar Oct-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Margo G. Fleming in Propria Persona
Helynna L. Brooke in Propria Persona.

The Parties explained circumstances to support their petition. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage (order signed in open Court).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
